installCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.34.4 --activate && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --config.optional=true

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://challenges.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' https: data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://ngdwybpgacauorygoedi.supabase.co wss://ngdwybpgacauorygoedi.supabase.co https://api.qrserver.com; frame-src https://challenges.cloudflare.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
